lines.text: (into the loop) [pause] Geneva, Harmony One. We're on the surface. I have all six in front of me.
Harmony One, this is Accord Coordination, Geneva. You are directed to proceed with retrieval of all six artifacts. [pause] Immediately, please.
(into the loop) [deliberate] You want 'em? Come through us.
(into the loop) Geneva, Harmony One. The site is... [hesitates] occupied by personnel asserting jurisdiction. Requesting political guidance.
(low) [quietly] Washington wants one word sent up. Says just acknowledge.
(off the table) [flatly] Deal 'em face down. Wind'll take 'em.

[warmly] Gentlemen. It's Zoran. The whole planet is standing still for you right now, and every one of them wants the same thing, which is a whole day, a good day, a day we can all share. So let me help you get there.
(then) [deliberate] As your Commander in Chief, I am ordering you to stand down, Commander.
(into the loop) You're not my commander, sir. [pause] NASA's civilian. Always was. That was the whole point of it.
